title: C55 · Privacy as the Seventh Capital

story.text:
# 💡 C55 · Privacy as the Seventh Capital
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Privacy is a foundational capital category — the seventh, alongside the six classical capitals — normative-architectural. Provisional (70%). Tome III Act III.9. Resonance Mana (🔭) is the 7th Capital in motion.

## Edges in

- [[Tome III Act 9: The Seventh Capital]] *introduces* →
